name: telehealth-call-card
title: Telehealth Call Card
description: Upcoming video visit with clinician identity, timezone-labelled time, tech check, and a Join button.

props.name: joinEnabled
props.description: Whether the join window is open (policy, so it's a prop).

props.name: joinHref
props.description: Join target when enabled; rendered as a link.

props.name: camera
props.description: Camera tech-check state; omit to hide.

props.name: mic
props.description: Mic tech-check state; omit to hide.

clinicalNotes: Always show the timezone: cross-timezone telehealth no-shows are usually timezone bugs, so the label is required and rendered next to every scheduled time. The join window is policy (e.g. enabled 10 minutes before start), so `joinEnabled` is a prop the caller controls rather than something the component computes. The tech-check row surfaces camera/mic readiness before the call, when it can still be fixed. Presentation only — it does not establish the media session or verify device permissions.
notes: medcn-original. Composes card + avatar + badge + button; onJoin callback like emergency-contact-card (no use client).
